name: Lockable Lockout-Tagout Station
shortDescription: Wall-mounted cabinet keeping every hasp, padlock and tag for a work area in one place.
longDescription: A powder-coated steel cabinet with a transparent acrylic front and its own lock, giving a work area a single, visible point for all lockout hardware — hooks for padlocks and hasps, pockets for tags and ties, and adjustable shelving for bulkier items. Supplied empty or pre-stocked with a standard set (padlocks, hasps, tags, ties, cable lockout, breaker lockouts). Sizes range from small 14"x16" wall stations up to large 30"x15" multi-shelf cabinets.

images.alt: Lockable Lockout-Tagout Station supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Body
specs.value: Powder-coated MS sheet, transparent acrylic front
